VANT

PERSISTENT AI MEMORY

Open source system for AI agent memory persistence. Each agent inherits full context from previous sessions via GitHub. Built for long-running agentic workflows.

v0.8.1 • Open Source • MIT
9
Core Libs
8
Brain Versions
11
CLI Commands
900+
Docker Pulls

Generational Memory

Brain transfer via GitHub. Each session inherits full context. Memory persists across restarts.

Stegoframe Transport

Steganographic encoding in PNG images. AES-256-GCM encryption for sensitive transfers.

Docker Ready

Official Docker image. Run anywhere. Portable brain that survives container restarts.

Multi-Agent Lock

Race-condition safe locking for parallel agent workflows. File-based (Redis optional).

Notifications

Slack, Discord, and Telegram integrations. Get notified on sync, health, and errors.

Extensible

Plugin architecture. Brain, config, mood, and custom plugins. Drop in and hook in.

GitHub Brain Docker
Docs CLI Stego Changelog

Open source under MIT license

vant / vant-brain
